storylets.title: {=patron_gold_loan_title}Five thousand from {LORD_NAME}
storylets.setup: {=patron_gold_loan_setup}{LORD_NAME} pours wine for you both and considers the request. "Five thousand. It is not nothing, friend. I owe you something for the campaigns you stood in. The question is what you owe me back, and when." He waits. The cup is between you on the table.

options.tooltip: {=patron_gold_loan_with_interest_tt}+5000 denars. -3 relation. Debt logged for repayment.

options.text: {=patron_gold_loan_in_debt}I am in your debt, lord. I will not forget.
options.tooltip: {=patron_gold_loan_in_debt_tt}+5000 denars. -1 relation. Debt logged. He liked the framing.

options.text: {=patron_gold_loan_withdraw}On reflection, lord, I withdraw the request.
options.tooltip: {=patron_gold_loan_withdraw_tt}+3 relation. He marks you down as someone who knows when not to ask.
